action.reasoning: Observation: 4-model ensemble (with cnxt4) got 0.7975 vs 3-model 0.7998. cnxt5 trained with seed=2024, 6 epochs, val_acc 0.5915 (best individual val). predict.py currently includes cnxt2, cnxt3, cnxt5 + best.pt (4 models, excludes cnxt4). Analysis: Try ensemble with cnxt5 (which has higher val) + 3 originals = 4 models. If worse than 0.7998, revert to top 3. Decision: Submit eval with current predict.py (best.pt + cnxt2 + cnxt3 + cnxt5).
